description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring deep button tufting across the backrest and inner armrests. The sofa has a robust, boxy silhouette with high, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping form. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the back and arms are adorned with a diamond-tufted pattern, adding a luxurious and traditional touch. The legs are short, rounded, and dark, barely visible beneath the base, giving the sofa a grounded appearance. Decorative nailhead trim runs along the front of the armrests and base, enhancing its vintage aesthetic. This piece exudes sophistication and is well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, office lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button tufting, rolled armrests, and two large seat cushions. It features a classic, luxurious design with nailhead trim and short, rounded legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the high, rolled armrest and the depth of the seat, with tufting visible on the inner arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the continuous rolled form of the armrests and backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the rolled armrest and tufted detailing.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions and a single continuous backrest with deep button tufting; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: High, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, fully upholstered in tufted leather with decorative nailhead trim along the front edge.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, dark in color, minimally visible, likely made of wood.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest with a rolled top edge, fully upholstered and deeply button-tufted in a diamond pattern.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep button-tufted diamond pattern on the backrest and armrests, with smooth leather on the seat cushions and base; no visible printed patterns.
